confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Desktop three-column layout started at Tailwind lg instead of the required 1280 px breakpoint.
confirmedFindingsFixed.fix: Changed shell grid to use the xl breakpoint and placed hero/search, forecast, and map in the three-column layout.

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Placeholder search was a real form and could submit typed city text into the URL before search was implemented.
confirmedFindingsFixed.fix: Changed the placeholder to a non-submitting search region with a read-only unnamed input.

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Shell UI strings were not centralized in the required i18n scaffold.
confirmedFindingsFixed.fix: Added `lib/i18n/uk.ts` and `lib/i18n/en.ts`, then routed shell content through the Ukrainian scaffold.

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Theme indicator said light theme even when system dark mode was active.
confirmedFindingsFixed.fix: Changed the placeholder copy to a neutral system-theme label.
